title: The Chasm Delvers

'''The Chasm Delvers''' is a [[World Quest]] Series in [[The Chasm (Subregion)|The Chasm]], [[Liyue]].

Requirement: {{Quest|A New Star Approaches|display=fullSentence|requirements=1}}

==List of Quests==
# [[The Chasm Charters]]
# [[Surreptitious Seven-Star Seal Sundering]]
# [[Chasm Spelunkers]]
#* [[First Miasmic Contact]]
#* [[Meeting New People... and Foiling Some Bandits]]
# [[The Heavenly Stone's Debris]]
# [[Perils in the Dark]]
# [[Wherefore Did the Spiritstone Descend?]]

==Summary==
The Traveler accepts a commission from the [[Adventurers' Guild]] and meets [[Muning]], the [[Ministry of Civil Affairs]] representative, who is concerned about strange occurrences in the sealed-off Chasm. A formal exploration team, including the engineer [[Zhiqiong]], is formed to venture into the depths. The initial objective is to unseal the Chasm's entrance, which is blocked by a "Seven-Star Seal" created by the [[Liyue Qixing]]. The Traveler helps destroy five large [[Bedrock Key|Bedrock Keys]] located in the surface area of the Chasm, which grants access to the [[The Chasm: Underground Mines|Underground Mines]].

Once inside, the team sets up a base camp. The Traveler assists with various tasks, such as finding missing miners (like [[Uncle He]]), dealing with [[Treasure Hoarders]], and using the [[Lumenstone Adjuvant]] to light up the dark areas and clear a mysterious "dark mud" ([[Oozing Concretion]]) that spreads [[Abyssal Corruption]]. Zhiqiong works on mapping the new terrain as the Traveler explores deeper. A sealed passage to the even deeper areas is found, blocked by a large rockfall. The Traveler and the team use a giant cannon, which requires finding specific parts and preparing special essential oil fuses, to blast open the path.

The Traveler ventures into the deepest parts of the Chasm, an area connected to the [[cataclysm]] that occurred 500 years ago and the [[Abyss]]. They discover an ancient ruin, a massive mechanism, and the source of the dark mud: a corrupted "[[Skyfrost Nail]]" (a type of meteorite) that fell from [[Celestia]] and has been infected by the [[Abyss Order]]. The Traveler purifies the large, corrupted nail, causing the black ooze to recede and the earthquakes in the region to subside. This action effectively resolves the primary environmental crisis. Zhiqiong, driven by a desire for further adventure and answers, decides to stay behind and explore even more of the Abyss-touched area alone, her fate left somewhat ambiguous. The main exploration team secures the area, and Muning makes their group an official part of the [[Huishan Hall]]'s operations.

==Trivia==
* Before [[Version 4.3]], a part of this quest series needed to be completed to progress through the {{Quest|In the Depths, an Unexpected Reunion}}. A [[Teleport Waypoint]] was updated to automatically unlock at a certain step of the Archon Quest to no longer require this quest.
